# AppClipDefaultExperienceUpdateRequest.Data.Relationships

**Object**

The relationships to other resources that you can set with this request.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppClipDefaultExperienceUpdateRequest.Data.Relationships
```

## Objects

- **AppClipDefaultExperienceUpdateRequest.Data.Relationships.ReleaseWithAppStoreVersion**: The relationship to the App Store Versions resource you set with the request that updates a Default App Clip Experiences resource.

## Objects

- **AppClipDefaultExperienceUpdateRequest.Data.Attributes**: The attributes you set that describe the new Default App Clip Experiences resource.
